overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in white robes descending a spiral stone staircase inside a gothic castle. The walls are lined with numerous framed portraits, and the character passes an ornate wooden door and two NPCs before continuing down the winding corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase upper level with portrait gallery

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the spiral staircase, passing various framed portraits on the stone walls

entered.detail: gothic stone railing with pointed arch cutouts following the spiral curve
curved stone block wall covered with numerous framed portraits of various sizes
patterned stone floor tiles in hexagonal arrangement

segments.scene_description: The character descends the upper level of a spiral stone staircase lined with framed portraits. The gothic stone railing curves along the right side while hexagonal floor tiles pattern the ground. The warm artificial lighting illuminates the historic stone walls covered in artwork.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase with ornate door and NPCs

events.description: large ornate wooden door with golden animal symbols becomes visible on the left wall
two figures in dark robes appear ahead standing by the stone railing

agents.ego_description: continuing down the spiral, approaching the ornate door and two stationary figures ahead

notable_agents.action: two figures in dark robes standing by the railing looking over the edge into the central void

entered.detail: dark wooden door with intricate golden animal symbols including an owl and cat emblem

segments.scene_description: As the character continues descending, an ornate wooden door with golden symbols comes into view on the left wall. Two figures in dark robes stand ahead by the railing, looking over the edge into the central void. The character approaches both the door and the stationary figures while navigating the curving path.

events.description: character passes the two NPCs and continues descending the spiral
the ornate wooden door passes out of view behind the character

agents.ego_description: walking past the NPCs and continuing the descent down the lower section of the spiral staircase

segments.scene_description: The character passes the two NPCs and the ornate door, continuing the descent down the spiral. The stone railing and portrait-covered walls remain consistent as the path winds downward. The lower sections of the spiral staircase become visible ahead as the character progresses deeper into the castle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent down a gothic spiral staircase, moving from the upper galleries deeper into the heart of a historic castle. It begins by following a character in white robes as they navigate hexagonal floor tiles and stone railings lined with framed portraits under warm artificial light. As the character continues downward, the path curves to reveal an ornate wooden door marked with golden symbols and two dark-robed figures standing motionless by the railing. The camera then glides past these figures and the door, maintaining the winding trajectory along the artwork-covered walls. Finally, the scene opens up to reveal the lower sections of the spiral as the character progresses further into the depths of the stone corridor.
